documentation:
## Aliyun ROS MOBI Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as MOBI from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-mobi';
```

documentation:
---
param enable_resource_property_constraint: '-'

param scope: '- scope in which this resource is defined.'
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.datasource.RosWorkspaces.ROS_RESOURCE_TYPE_NAME
documentation: The resource type name for this resource class.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.datasource.RosWorkspaces.attr_workspace_ids
documentation: :Attribute: WorkspaceIds: The list of workspace IDs.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.datasource.RosWorkspaces.refresh_options
documentation:
:Property:

refreshOptions: The refresh strategy for the datasource resource when the stack is updated. Valid values:

- Never: Never refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
- Always: Always refresh the datasource resource when the stack is updated.
Default is Never.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `DATASOURCE::MOBI::Workspaces`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `Workspaces` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/datasource-mobi-workspaces>

modules.name: ros_cdk_mobi
documentation:
## Aliyun ROS MOBI Construct Library

This module is part of the AliCloud ROS Cloud Development Kit (ROS CDK) project.

```python
import * as MOBI from '@alicloud/ros-cdk-mobi';
```

classes.name: ros_cdk_mobi.App

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.App.__init__
documentation:
Param scope - scope in which this resource is defined Param id - scoped id of the resource Param props - resource properties.

```
param scope



param id



param props



param enable_resource_property_constraint

```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.App.attr_app_icon
documentation:
Attribute AppIcon: Application icon label, The system provides an icon by default, which is given in the form of a label.

The default value is -1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.App.attr_app_type
documentation:
Attribute AppType: The application type.

Web applications and Copilot applications are supported.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.App.attr_app_workspace_id
documentation: Attribute AppWorkspaceId: Workspace ID of application, The application belongs to the workspace.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.App.attr_create_time
documentation: Attribute CreateTime: Create time of application.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.App.attr_modified_time
documentation: Attribute ModifiedTime: Modified time of application.

This class encapsulates and extends the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::MOBI::App`.

```
Note

```

This class may have some new functions to facilitate development, so it is recommended to use this class instead of RosApp\`\`for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mobi-app>

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.AppProps.__init__
documentation:
Properties for defining a `App`.

See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mobi-app>

```
param app_icon

Property appIcon: Application icon label, The system provides an icon by default, which is given in the form of a label. The default value is -1.

param app_name

Property appName: The application name.

param app_workspace_id

Property appWorkspaceId: Workspace ID of application, The application belongs to the workspace.

param template

Property template: Application Template.

param app_description

Property appDescription: Description of application.

param app_type

Property appType: The application type. Web applications and Copilot applications are supported. - Web:Web application. - Copilot:Copilot application.
```

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.AppProps.app_icon
documentation:
Property appIcon: Application icon label, The system provides an icon by default, which is given in the form of a label.

The default value is -1.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.AppProps.app_workspace_id
documentation: Property appWorkspaceId: Workspace ID of application, The application belongs to the workspace.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.AppProps.app_type
documentation:
Property appType: The application type.

Web applications and Copilot applications are supported.

- **Web**:Web application.
- **Copilot**:Copilot application.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.RosApp.TemplateProperty.__init__
documentation:
---
param actual_parameters: true
param connections_content: true
param template_id: true
---

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.RosApp.TemplateProperty.connections_content
documentation:
:Property:

connectionsContent: Connector configuration. When creating an application, you need to rely on connectors to integrate external systems and services.
The connector magic pen platform provides a wealth of connectors, such as MySQL connectors, HTTP connectors, and hundreds of application connectors.
Take the Enterprise official website template as an example, the MySQL Connector depends on, so you need to replace the MySQL connection information in the following string.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.RosApp.TemplateProperty.template_id
documentation: :Property: templateId: The application Template number. For specific templates, you can view all templates in the template market on the product console. The product console address is https://mobinext.console.aliyun.com.

methods.name: ros_cdk_mobi.RosApp.TemplateProperty.actual_parameters
documentation: :Property: actualParameters: Actual Parameters. Take the Enterprise official website template as an example, you do not need to fill in this parameter.

This class is a base encapsulation around the ROS resource type `ALIYUN::MOBI::App`.

```
Note

```

This class does not contain additional functions, so it is recommended to use the `App` class instead of this class for a more convenient development experience.
See <https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/ros/developer-reference/aliyun-mobi-app>
